metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5175
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 3a,b: Cultured hippocampal neurons were immunostained for endogenous Smaug1 (SAMD4A), PSD95 (DLG4) and synapsin. Smaug1 partially co-localized with PSD95 in closer proximity than presynaptic marker protein synapsin.

Figure 3e: Smaug1 and PSD95 were enriched in PSD biochemical fractions from adult hippocampus as compared to input lysate and Synaptoneurosomes.. Experimental description: M&M: "Hippocampal cultures were prepared as described previously (Banker and Goslin, 1998). In brief, hippocampi were dissected from Sprague Dawley rats at embryonic day 18 and digested with trypsin."

antibody:
anti-mammalian Smaug1, 1:300-1:1,000 (Baez and Boccaccio, 2005) PMID:16221671

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
